rows.Key Lesson: Modelled-loss designs can support multi-peril sovereign protection
rows.Explanation: The deal covers earthquakes and cyclones with a discrete principal reduction scale
rows.Relevance for Sovereign Finance: Enables structured fiscal protection without indemnity loss adjustment

rows.Key Lesson: Principal-reduction scales can operationalize partial payouts
rows.Explanation: The 0/35/70/100 structure supports partial liquidity without full exhaustion
